summary: Powerful audience recording captures an electric Dark Star and soaring Jerry, with generally good soundstage despite occasional muffled moments.
review: The show is remembered as a monster performance – Dark Star erupts, the crowd goes wild and Jerry’s solo is described as soulful and transcendent. The audience source delivers a booming, enveloping soundstage that many praise, though a few note muddiness on early tracks and it can’t match a pristine SBD.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers celebrate the music (especially Dark Star) and give high marks for performance; recording quality is praised by the majority but a few criticisms keep the overall rating just above four.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe a wonderful soundstage, booming presence of Phil and enveloping crowd energy. A handful mention muffled or hollow early‑track audio and that it doesn’t reach SBD fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set is repeatedly highlighted as superior to the SBD versions, with Dark Star and extended jams generating massive crowd reaction; overall pacing is described as thrilling and unforgettable.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers gush about Jerry’s soaring solo on Dark Star and the soul he brings to the performance.
band_member_comments.Phil: One reviewer notes a booming Phil presence that adds energy to the mix.
